hero.title: Cleaning services in Warsaw
hero.subtitle: The service includes a kitchen, bathroom, rooms and a hallway

fixed_price.title: Fixed price
fixed_price.desc: The cleaning cost depends on the number of rooms, and not on the area of the apartment

payment.title: Card or cash
payment.desc: You choose how you prefer to pay - by credit card or cash

insured.title: Our services are insured
insured.desc: Your home is in safe hands. We take full responsibility for our work.

supplies.title: We bring all supplies
supplies.desc: For each order, we have the necessary professional supplies

q1.q: Can I try and cancel my subscription at any moment?
q1.a: We do not sign a long-term contract - only one for each specific order. Therefore, the subscription can be canceled and quickly renewed.

q2.a: Yes, all dates and time are flexible. You will receive a confirmation SMS with a link to edit the date, time and cleaning parameters.

q3.q: Is it possible to choose one cleaner?
q3.a: Yes, we assume that the same person will always come to your cleanings. After the first order and a positive assessment, the cleaner will be automatically assigned.

calculator.title: Calculate the Cleaning Cost
calculator.subtitle: Select your cleaning parameters and get an instant quote. No hidden fees.

contact_form.title: Contact Us
contact_form.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll get back to you shortly
contact_form.privacy: We will contact you within 24 hours

errors.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number
errors.services_required: Please select at least one service

success.title: Thank you!
success.message: We will contact you shortly. Thank you for choosing us!

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Professional cleaning services with a personal touch
about.description: We are a team of dedicated professionals committed to providing exceptional cleaning services. With years of experience, we ensure your home or office is spotless and welcoming. Our eco-friendly products and trained staff guarantee the highest quality results.
about.mission_desc: To make every space shine while caring for the environment and our community.
about.team_desc: Experienced cleaners who take pride in their work and treat your home with respect.
